text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
It's time for summer camp! Have you ever heard a
more beautiful word?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Don't hold back, Trainer! I want you to work me
till I drop! We've got to train hard so I'll have
what it takes for the Swan Stakes!
